question:
## MITRE ATT&CK Review
Use the extracted technique IDs and the saved-search SPL to confirm the mapping is accurate.

Reference: [MITRE ATT&CK](https://attack.mitre.org/)
Is at least one MITRE technique ID present?
description: Security detections should usually map to at least one tactic/technique unless the use case is operational.

question: Are the mapped techniques appropriate for the detection logic?
description: Validate that the SPL actually observes the mapped behaviour, not just a related outcome.

question: Are sub-techniques used where applicable?
description: Prefer a specific sub-technique when the detection logic is narrow enough to support it.

question: Is the tactic coverage complete for this detection?
description: Consider whether additional tactics apply, such as Discovery, Credential Access, or Exfiltration.

question: MITRE review notes
description: List technique IDs to add/remove and the reason for each change.
